title: glechoma ucranica
intro: Glechoma ucranica, also known as Ukrainian mint or creeping mint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, Glechoma ucranica has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Glechoma ucranica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make remedies for colds, fever, and other ailments.
